name: radl

metadata.name: RADL
metadata.summary: Resource and Application Description Language (RADL) parser.

documentation: The main purpose of the Resource and Application description Language (RADL) is to specify the requirements of the scientific applications needed to be deployed in a virtualized computational infrastructure (cloud). It is compatible with both Python 2 and Python 3

Parse a RADL document.

Return: RADL object.

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.t_comment
documentation: Ignore comments.

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.t_ANY_error
documentation: Error handling rule

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_radl
documentation:
radl : radl radl_sentence
| radl_sentence
| description_sentence radl

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_radl_sentence
documentation:
radl_sentence : network_sentence
| ansible_sentence
| system_sentence
| configure_sentence
| contextualize_sentence
| deploy_sentence

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_description_sentence
documentation:
description_sentence : DESCRIPTION VAR
| DESCRIPTION VAR LPAREN features RPAREN

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_configure_sentence
documentation:
configure_sentence : CONFIGURE VAR
| CONFIGURE VAR LPAREN RECIPE_BEGIN recipe RECIPE_END RPAREN
| CONFIGURE VAR LPAREN RPAREN

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_recipe
documentation:
recipe : RECIPE_LINE
| RECIPE_LINE recipe

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_deploy_sentence
documentation:
deploy_sentence : DEPLOY VAR NUMBER
| DEPLOY VAR NUMBER VAR

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_contextualize_sentence
documentation:
contextualize_sentence : CONTEXTUALIZE LPAREN contextualize_options contextualize_items RPAREN
| CONTEXTUALIZE NUMBER LPAREN contextualize_options contextualize_items RPAREN

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_contextualize_options
documentation:
contextualize_options : contextualize_options contextualize_option
| contextualize_option
| empty

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_contextualize_option
documentation:
contextualize_option : OPTION VAR comparator STRING
| OPTION VAR comparator NUMBER

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_contextualize_items
documentation:
contextualize_items : contextualize_items contextualize_item
| contextualize_item
| empty

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_contextualize_item
documentation:
contextualize_item : SYSTEM VAR CONFIGURE VAR
| SYSTEM VAR CONFIGURE VAR STEP NUMBER
| SYSTEM VAR CONFIGURE VAR WITH VAR

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_network_sentence
documentation:
network_sentence : NETWORK VAR
| NETWORK VAR LPAREN features RPAREN

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_ansible_sentence
documentation: ansible_sentence : ANSIBLE VAR LPAREN features RPAREN

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_system_sentence
documentation:
system_sentence : SYSTEM VAR
| SYSTEM VAR LPAREN features RPAREN

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_features
documentation:
features : features AND feature
| feature
| empty

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_feature
documentation:
feature : feature_soft
| feature_simple
| feature_contains

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_feature_soft
documentation: feature_soft : SOFT NUMBER LPAREN features RPAREN

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_feature_simple
documentation:
feature_simple : VAR comparator NUMBER VAR
| VAR comparator NUMBER
| VAR comparator LBRACK string_list RBRACK
| VAR comparator STRING

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_empty
documentation: empty :

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_comparator
documentation:
comparator : EQ
| LT
| GT
| GE
| LE

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_feature_contains
documentation: feature_contains : VAR CONTAINS LPAREN features RPAREN

methods.name: radl.radl_parse.RADLParser.p_string_list
documentation:
string_list : string_list COMMA STRING
| STRING
| empty

functions.name: radl.radl.UnitToValue
documentation: Return the value of an unit.

functions.name: radl.radl.check_outports_format
documentation:
Check the format of the outports string.
Valid formats:
8899/tcp-8899/tcp,22/tcp-22/tcp
8899/tcp-8899,22/tcp-22
8899-8899,22-22
8899/tcp,22/udp
8899,22
1:10/tcp,9:22/udp
1:10,9:22

classes.name: radl.radl.Feature

methods.name: radl.radl.Feature.clone
documentation: Return a copy of this Feature.

methods.name: radl.radl.Feature.getLogOperator
documentation: Return the operator of this Feature in python style.

methods.name: radl.radl.Feature.getValue
documentation:
Return the value of the feature.

If the unit is specified and the feature has a unit, the value is converted

Args:
- unit(str,optional): A unit to convert the current feature value ('B','K','M','G')

methods.name: radl.radl.Feature._check
documentation:
Check type, operator and unit in a feature.

Args:
- check(tuple):
   - v[0]: expected type of the feature value.
   - v[1]: can be a list of possible values or a function to test the value or None.
   - v[2] (optional): can be a list of possible units; if None or not set the
     unit valid is none.
- radl: second argument passed when calling v[1].

Every property that can appear in the definitions of a `network` and `system`.

Args:
\- prop: feature name.
\- operator: `<=`, `=`, `=>` or `contains`.
\- value: value associated to the feature.
\- unit: like `K`, `M` and `G`.
\- line: line number in the RADL document.

classes.name: radl.radl.Features

methods.name: radl.radl.Features.features
documentation: List of features.

methods.name: radl.radl.Features.clone
documentation: Return a copy of this aspect.

methods.name: radl.radl.Features.addFeature
documentation:
Add a feature.

Args:

- f(Feature): feature to add.
- conflict(str): if a property hasn't compatible values/constrains, do:
  : - `"error"`: raise exception.
    - `"ignore"`: go on.
    - `"me"`: keep the old value.
    - `"other"`: set the passed value.
- missing(str): if a property has not been set yet, do:
  : - `"error"`: raise exception.
    - `"ignore"`: do nothning.
    - `"me"`: do nothing.
    - `"other"`: set the passed value.

methods.name: radl.radl.Features.hasFeature
documentation: Return if there is a property with that name.

methods.name: radl.radl.Features.getValue
documentation: Return the value of feature with that name or `default`.

methods.name: radl.radl.Features.getFeature
documentation: Return the feature with that name.

methods.name: radl.radl.Features.setValue
documentation: Set the value of feature with that name.

methods.name: radl.radl.Features.delValue
documentation: Remove the feature with that name.

methods.name: radl.radl.Features._applyInter
documentation:
Return the restriction of first interval by the second.

Args:

- inter0, inter1 (tuple of Feature): intervals

Return(tuple of Feature): the resulting interval
\- conflict(str): if a property hasn't compatible values/constrains, do:

> - `"error"`: raise exception.
> - `"ignore"`: return None.
> - `"me"`: return finter0.
> - `"other"`: return finter1.

methods.name: radl.radl.Features.applyFeatures
documentation:
Apply the constrain of the features passed to this instance.

:::{warning}
Feature instances are only considered, that is, SoftFeatures will be
not considered.
:::

Args:

- new_features(Features): features to apply
- conflict(str): if a property hasn't compatible values/constrains, do:
  : - `"error"`: raise exception.
    - `"ignore"`: nothing.
    - `"me"`: preserve the original value.
    - `"other"`: set like the passed feature.
- missing(str): if a property is missing in some side, do:
  : - `"error"`: raise exception.
    - `"ignore"`: nothing.
    - `"me"`: preserve the original value.
    - `"other"`: set like the passed feature.

methods.name: radl.radl.Features.check_simple
documentation: Check types, operators and units in simple features.

methods.name: radl.radl.Features.check_num
documentation:
Check types, operators and units in features with numbers.

Args:

- checks(dict of dict of str:tuples): keys are property name prefixes, and the
  values are dict with keys are property name suffixes and values are iterable
  as in `_check_feature`.
- radl: passed to `_check_feature`.
Collects a group of features.

classes.name: radl.radl.RADL

methods.name: radl.radl.RADL.add
documentation:
Add a network, ansible_host, system, deploy, configure or contextualize.

Args:
\- aspect(network, system, deploy, configure or contextualize): thing to add.
\- ifpresent(str): if it has been defined, do:

> - `"ignore"`: not add the aspect.
> - `"replace"`: replace by the old defined.
> - `"error"`: raise an error.

Return(bool): True if aspect was added.
